# bytepluscc_id_oauth2_credential_provider (Data Source)

Data Source schema for Byteplus::ID::Oauth2CredentialProvider



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Uniquely identifies the resource.

### Read-Only

- `config` (Attributes) OAuth2 configuration (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--config))
- `created_at` (String) Creation time
- `credential_provider_trn` (String) Credential provider TRN
- `name` (String) Name
- `pool_name` (String) Workload pool name
- `project_name` (String) Project name
- `secret_trn` (String) Secret TRN corresponding to credential ciphertext
- `updated_at` (String) Update time
- `vendor` (Number) OAuth2 provider type. 0: Custom, 1: Google, 2: Github, 3: Coze, 4: Feishu, 5: WeChat, 6: User pool

<a id="nestedatt--config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `config`

Read-Only:

- `client_id` (String) OAuth2 Client ID。
- `client_secret` (String) OAuth2 Client Secret。
- `custom_parameters` (Attributes) Default custom parameters in GetResourceOauth2Token request (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--config--custom_parameters))
- `flow` (String) Default Flow in GetResourceOauth2Token request. Optional values: USER_FEDERATION, M2M
- `force_authentication` (Boolean) Default ForceAuthentication in GetResourceOauth2Token request
- `max_expires` (Number) Maximum token validity (seconds)
- `metadata` (String) Custom metadata
- `oauth_2_discovery` (Attributes) OAuth2 discovery information (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--config--oauth_2_discovery))
- `redirect_url` (String) Default RedirectUrl in GetResourceOauth2Token request
- `scopes` (Set of String) Default Scopes in GetResourceOauth2Token request
- `secret_storage` (Attributes) Encrypted storage configuration (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--config--secret_storage))

<a id="nestedatt--config--custom_parameters"></a>
### Nested Schema for `config.custom_parameters`

Read-Only:

- `entries` (Attributes Set) Custom parameter entry list (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--config--custom_parameters--entries))

<a id="nestedatt--config--custom_parameters--entries"></a>
### Nested Schema for `config.custom_parameters.entries`

Read-Only:

- `key` (String) Parameter key
- `value` (String) Parameter value



<a id="nestedatt--config--oauth_2_discovery"></a>
### Nested Schema for `config.oauth_2_discovery`

Read-Only:

- `authorization_server_metadata` (Attributes) Authorization server metadata (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--config--oauth_2_discovery--authorization_server_metadata))
- `discovery_url` (String) DiscoveryUrl field

<a id="nestedatt--config--oauth_2_discovery--authorization_server_metadata"></a>
### Nested Schema for `config.oauth_2_discovery.authorization_server_metadata`

Read-Only:

- `authorization_endpoint` (String) AuthorizationEndpoint field
- `code_challenge_methods_supported` (Set of String) CodeChallengeMethodsSupported field
- `issuer` (String) Issuer field
- `registration_endpoint` (String) RegistrationEndpoint field
- `response_types` (Set of String) ResponseTypes field
- `revocation_endpoint` (String) RevocationEndpoint field
- `token_endpoint` (String) TokenEndpoint field



<a id="nestedatt--config--secret_storage"></a>
### Nested Schema for `config.secret_storage`

Read-Only:

- `encryption_key` (String) KMS key TRN for encrypted credential value. If not specified, the default key is used
- `storage_type` (Number) Encrypted storage type. 0: SecretManager, 1: KMS
